public-home.name: Home Page
public-home.description: User navigates to the home page and sees hero, stats, programs, and footer

public-navigation.name: Site Navigation
public-navigation.description: Shared layout with navbar, footer, WhatsApp button; sticky header and mobile hamburger menu

public-program-browse.name: Browse Program
public-program-browse.description: User navigates to a program page via slug and sees program details

public-english-page.name: English Program Page
public-english-page.description: User navigates to the dedicated English program landing page

lead-submit-form.name: Submit Lead Form
lead-submit-form.description: User fills and submits the lead capture form on the home page
knownGaps: Does not test actual backend submission (no API mock)

lead-whatsapp-cta.name: WhatsApp CTA
lead-whatsapp-cta.description: User clicks the floating WhatsApp button to open a pre-filled WhatsApp conversation
